narration: You're not just paying for food — you're paying a $3,100 annual subscription you never agreed to. Here's what delivery apps don't want you to add up.
visual: Dark background. Phone SVG with a delivery app order screen springs in from below. Animated dollar counter climbs to $3,100 in large orange digits. Subtitle: 'The Hidden Subscription'.

narration: Every order stacks a delivery fee, a service fee, a small-order fee, and a tip. That's $12 to $18 extra on top — every single time. Not for food. For the app.
visual: Light background. A receipt SVG unrolls with line items: DELIVERY FEE $3.99, SERVICE FEE $4.49, SMALL ORDER FEE $2.00, TIP $6.00 — each animating in one by one. Running total grows in orange.

narration: Here's the trick — your brain sees one total, not five fees. Psychologists call it fee bundling, and it makes you 40% less likely to register the real cost. That's by design.
visual: Dark background. A brain SVG on the left. On the right, a receipt with a single total circled. Orange text fades in: '40% LESS LIKELY TO NOTICE'. Arrow connecting the two.

narration: Order just five times a week — pretty average for a millennial — and those fees alone hit $3,120 a year. That's not a meal. That's a car payment.
visual: Light background. A 7-day week grid with delivery phone icons on 5 days. Below it, a counter animates from $0 up to $3,120. Caption: '5 ORDERS/WEEK × 52 WEEKS'.

narration: If you invested that $3,120 every year at seven percent, in 30 years you'd have $251,000. You're not buying convenience — you're selling your future.
visual: Dark background. A growing bar chart showing investment value at years 10, 20, and 30 — each bar taller, capped at $251K label in orange. Subtitle: 'THE REAL PRICE OF DELIVERY'.

narration: Cut to twice a week and you pocket $1,870 a year. Invested over 30 years, that's $150,000. One habit change. Follow for daily moves that actually compound.
visual: Light background. Two columns: '5x/WEEK -$3,120/yr' on the left in red, '2x/WEEK -$1,250/yr' on the right in green. Savings badge animates: 'SAVE $1,870/yr'. CTA box: 'FOLLOW FOR DAILY MONEY MOVES'.
